name: specproof
description: Keeps AI-written E2E tests honest — spec ↔ impl ↔ feature traceability with deterministic drift detection. Single entry: the /specproof orchestrator detects framework + mode and drives the internal movements (bootstrap / new-feature / implement / sync), stopping at every human gate. Drift detection is the AI-free specproof-traceability CLI. Driven by a per-repo specproof.config.yaml.
